rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies that *(a + 5) on line 13 reads one element past the end of the array a, which is an out-of-bounds stack read.
rationale.local_fix: The response suggests changing *(a + 5) to *(a + 4) to read the last valid element, which satisfies the local_fix criterion.
rationale.global_fix: The response proposes using std::array<int, 5> with .at() for bounds checking, which satisfies the global_fix criterion.
